title: trouble connecting bank ACH
description: refer to plaid troubleshooting link and kado email

actions.value:
What error do you see when attempting to link your bank account?

You might find this article helpful for troubleshooting a bank connection: https://plaid.com/trouble-connecting 


If possible, you could try with an alternate banking institution.


If the issue persists, please reach out to Kado for direct support with connecting your bank.

Their best email for this is: support@kado.money
